checklist.text: Priority claim to provisional 63/961,403 present in spec and ADS draft.
checklist.evidence: Filed application 19/691,526 locally records provisional priority claim to 63/961,403, filed 2026-01-15. Confirm again against the formal filing receipt when Patent Center posts it.

checklist.text: Independent and total claim counts checked for fee impact.
checklist.evidence: 28 total claims, 3 independent (claims 1, 9, 15), 25 dependent, 0 multiple-dependent. Micro-entity fees checked 2026-05-28 against the current USPTO fee schedule: $70 filing + $165 search + $200 exam = $435 base; 8 extra claims (21-28) x $40 = $320; total $755. Claims 27-28 added 2026-05-28: claim 27 (harmonic phase orthogonality, depends on 4), claim 28 (domain-specific entropy encoding, depends on 26). Claims 4 and 26 also enriched with semantic-domain and Cartesian-product language. No paper surcharge, no non-DOCX surcharge, no multiple-dependent surcharge. Re-check in Patent Center on filing day.

checklist.text: Fixed claims v3 produced with all inaccuracies resolved and production-unclaimed features added.
checklist.evidence: PATENT_CLAIMS_FIXED_v3.md created 2026-05-28. Claim 1 whereby clause rewritten (bounded exponential pi^(phi*d*), not superexponential; distance from centroid not proximity to boundary). Claim 3 adds species (iii) pi^(phi*d). Claim 21 reformulated from 5-predicate to N-predicate >=3 tracking actual 3-ring sacred_eggs.py. Claim 23 REPLACED EMA tau formula (archive only) with REROUTE 5th-decision-mode (production _check_reroute + DEFAULT_REROUTES). Claim 24 REPLACED Hopfield quadratic form (archive only) with null-space anomaly detection (production _null_space_anomaly lines 807-835). All other claims retained verbatim. CIP deferred items documented in v3 section 'What Has Been Deferred'. Fee estimate updated to $755 after adding claims 26-28 and checking the current USPTO fee schedule. Current filing packet is generated from build_patent_docx.py and contains 28 claims; PATENT_CLAIMS_FIXED_v3.md is superseded by PATENT_CLAIMS_EXPANDED_v2.md plus the generated DOCX.

checklist.text: Claim 1 formula language verified against _harmonic_cost implementation and corrected.
checklist.evidence: Audited runtime_gate.py _harmonic_cost lines 889-899: cost = PI^(PHI * d_star) where d_star = min(weighted_dist, 5.0), PHI=1.618, PI=pi. This is a BOUNDED EXPONENTIAL (cost at d*=0 is 1.0, at d*=1 is ~5.05, at d*=5 is ~9,070). It is NOT superexponential. Claim 1 filing-language now frames the governance cost as a nonlinear increasing function of measured drift from the session centroid and avoids locking the independent claim to a single B^(k*d) species. Spec DOCX has been rebuilt from build_patent_docx.py.

checklist.text: Spec DOCX claim 1 whereby clause updated to match fixed claims v3.
checklist.evidence: Applied 2026-05-28. build_patent_docx.py CLAIMS array updated: claim 1 whereby -> nonlinear measured-drift governance-cost language; claim 3 adds species (iii) pi^(phi*d); claim 21 N-predicate >=3 (semantic/geometric/crypto); claim 23 REROUTE replacing EMA tau; claim 24 null-space anomaly replacing Hopfield. SCBE_NONPROVISIONAL_SPEC_v1.docx rebuilt locally. Assembled MD also updated.

checklist.text: Drawings FIG 1-9 cover each feature claimed in independent claims.
checklist.evidence: FIG_1 through FIG_9 PNG files confirmed present 2026-05-28. Brief Description updated: FIG.1 now explicitly mentions four-way ALLOW/QUARANTINE/DENY/REROUTE output and fail-to-noise path; FIG.3 now explicitly mentions session centroid as trusted reference region and hyperbolic distance arc. Coverage map: Poincare embedding → FIG.3; session centroid → FIG.3; hyperbolic distance → FIG.3; nonlinear cost variants → FIG.2; four-way decision → FIG.1; fail-to-noise → FIG.1; Sacred Egg predicates → FIG.5; tongue weights + harmonic ratios + phase offsets → FIG.4; PQC dual-lattice consensus → FIG.6. Gap noted: bijective tamper detection (claims 15-20) lacks a dedicated figure but is covered by detailed pseudocode in the spec body — not a fatal defect.

checklist.text: Every claim element mapped to written-description support in spec.
checklist.evidence: Claims 1-28 mapped. Claims 1-22 and 25-28 have code-level or design support in PATENT_CLAIMS_FIXED_v3.md. REROUTE (claim 23) and null-space anomaly (claim 24) now explicitly described in PATENT_DETAILED_DESCRIPTION.md: REROUTE added after Layer 13 ESCALATE paragraph (five-tier variant, two-signal confirmation, reroute table, separate severity path); null-space anomaly added as Stage 0 in Section 9 (coordinate clustering check, uniformity threshold, anomaly score fed into composite risk). Both confirmed present in rebuilt SCBE_NONPROVISIONAL_SPEC_v1.docx (REROUTE coverage True, null-space coverage True). Still a risk that provisional 63/961,403 does not cover claims 23/24 -- these receive the non-provisional filing date not Jan 15 2026 priority during examination.

checklist.text: Post-2026-01-15 improvements separated from provisional-supported material.
checklist.evidence: CIP analysis complete in PATENT_CLAIMS_FIXED_v3.md 'What Has Been Deferred to CIP' section. Deferred: EMA swarm trust formula (archive only), Hopfield energy exact form (archive only), trichromatic governance (opt-in only), Tree of Escalation as decider (observational only), full 14-layer ordered composition claim, Sacred Tongues tokenizer (separate invention). Claims 21-28 in the fixed set are grounded in production code/design support or accepted as getting non-provisional date. Decision: include all 28 claims and accept that 21/23/24 receive the non-provisional filing date (not Jan 15, 2026 priority date) unless the provisional covers them — USPTO assigns the earliest supported date per claim during examination.

checklist.text: Prior-art search log completed and IDS decision made.
checklist.evidence: Search executed 2026-05-28. Three Google Patents/Justia/arXiv queries logged: (1) hyperbolic geometry/Poincare ball + security authorization, (2) hyperbolic embedding + authentication/access control, (3) semantic weighting/golden ratio/bijective token + security governance. 8 results logged in prior_art_search_log.md. IDS posture: no IDS obligation identified from searches performed so far; no result found teaching the full claimed combination. If additional references become known and are material to patentability under 37 CFR 1.56, prepare an IDS. This avoids the unsafe absolute phrasing 'no IDS required'.

checklist.text: Non-publication request decision made.
checklist.evidence: Decision 2026-05-28: NO non-publication request. Application publishes normally ~18 months after earliest priority date (2027-07-15). Rationale: SCBE has international applicability (South Korea, EU); PCT/foreign filing remains possible; requesting non-publication then filing foreign triggers strict USPTO consequences that are easy to mishandle pro se. Do NOT check the non-publication box in Patent Center.

checklist.text: Benchmark/test evidence packet prepared for prosecution support.
checklist.evidence: Keep benchmark evidence as prosecution support only. Do not add post-filing benchmark material to the filed case; track it for response evidence or continuation/CIP candidates.

checklist.text: Source-code appendix/pseudocode decision made.
checklist.evidence: Decision 2026-05-28: NO source-code appendix. The Detailed Description contains sufficient pseudocode inline for all claimed elements (tanh projection, centroid update, hyperbolic distance arcosh formula, harmonic cost pi^(phi*d*), fail-to-noise, reroute table, null-space anomaly, sacred egg predicates, bijective token formula). Filing source code creates prior-art publication risk and is not required. Pseudocode in spec is sufficient.

checklist.text: Inventor/applicant ownership posture confirmed.
checklist.evidence: Decision 2026-05-28: Ownership 100% inventor (Issac Daniel Davis). SAM.gov UEI J4NXHM6N5F59 shows sole proprietor. No university affiliation, no employer, no funded research contract. No assignment record required at filing — can be recorded later if an investor or acquirer needs it. No assignment document to prepare.
